tracks.meaning: a disagreement or debate between two or more people who have different opinions about something
a set of reasons or evidence presented to support or oppose a case in court
a series of statements or reasons intended to establish or refute a proposition
an input parameter or value passed to a function or program
a variable or expression representing an unknown quantity in an equation
a quarrel or heated disagreement, often involving anger or conflict
a line of reasoning or thought process used to support a conclusion or belief
a logical structure consisting of premises leading to a conclusion
